mapper.sql: select customer_id, external_userid, open_kfid, nickname, remark, first_contact_time, last_active_time, create_time, update_time from kf_customer
mapper.insert: insert into kf_customer (external_userid, open_kfid, nickname, remark, first_contact_time, last_active_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{externalUserid}, #{openKfid}, #{nickname}, #{remark}, #{firstContactTime}, #{lastActiveTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into kf_customer (external_userid, open_kfid, nickname, first_contact_time, last_active_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{externalUserid}, #{openKfid}, #{nickname}, now(), now(), now(), now()) on duplicate key update last_active_time = now(), update_time = now(), nickname = ifnull(nullif(#{nickname}, ''), nickname)
